title: The main SWIFT/BIC code for Bank Alfalah in Pakistan is ALFHPKKAXXX. This primary code is used for the head office and is the standard code for receiving international transfers if a specific branch code is unknown.Specific SWIFT/BIC codes vary by branch:Main Head Office (Karachi): ALFHPKKAXXXF-10 Markaz Branch (Islamabad): ALFHPKKA131Peoples Colony Branch (Faisalabad): ALFHPKKA054Uni Towers Branch (Karachi): ALFHPKKA505For more regional or branch-specific details, you can use the Bank Alfalah SWIFT Code Finder or view additional codes on the Wise Code Listing.If you can tell me the city or specific branch you are sending funds to, I can check if there is a branch-dedicated BIC code to speed up your transfer.
